description: Design Studio hooks — detect project context, validate HTML output, suggest follow-up commands

hooks.prompt:
If the file being written is an HTML file, check: (1) the tag has a lang attribute, (2) semantic elements are used (
,
,
,
,
,
) instead of only
, (3) all tags have alt attributes, (4) interactive elements use

Before finishing, if this session involved design work (building UI, editing CSS/HTML, creating Figma designs, or design-related tasks), suggest 1-2 relevant follow-up commands from: /design-review (quality audit), /design-system (extract tokens), /figma-create (build in Figma), /figma-sync (check design-code drift), /design-present (create presentation), /design-handoff (developer docs). Only suggest commands that naturally follow the completed work. Keep the suggestion brief — one sentence.
